logout_url.description: The URL to redirect the user to in order to log out ([Logout Redirect](/reference/sso/logout) endpoint ready to use).

logout_token.description: The logout token to be used in the [Logout Redirect](/reference/sso/logout) endpoint.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.
error_description.example: Single Logout is only supported for GenericOIDC connections.

error_description.description: A human-readable description of the error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
